# Release v1.2.0

CLI moved to a separate package, `BoardField` type exported, and codebase cleaned up.

---

## Changelog

## [1.2.0] - 2026-05-17

### Added

- Exported `BoardField` and `IBoard` types from the public API (`index.ts`)
- Added `BoardField` type alias (`number | PlayerSymbol`) to `types/Board.ts`

### Changed

- CLI (`src/ui/`) moved to a separate repository [t3core-cli](https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core-cli) — `npx t3core-cli`
- `bin` field removed from `package.json` — `t3core` is now a pure library
- `GameEventPayload` uses `BoardField[]` instead of `(number | PlayerSymbol)[]`
- `GameEventMap[PLAYER_MOVE]` payload simplified to `{ index: number }` (full state available via `game.snapshot`)
- `IBoard` and `IGame` use `BoardField` consistently
- `tsconfig.json` cleaned up — removed unused path alias `@/*` and narrowed `include`
- CI workflows (`publish.yml`, `pull-request.yml`) updated to use `yarn test --run`

### Removed

- CLI entry point `index.ts` and `src/ui/` removed from this repository
- `ts-node`, `ts-node-dev`, `tsconfig-paths` removed from `devDependencies`

[1.2.0]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core/compare/v1.1.4...v1.2.0
